apps.name: EoSim
apps.description: Full-stack hardware & platform simulator — emulate 63+ boards (ARM, RISC-V, ESP32, STM32, Raspberry Pi, Jetson, etc.), run EoS firmware, QEMU integration, native bus/CPU/memory simulation, GUI with 3D viewers, and domain-specific renderers for vehicles, drones, satellites, medical, weather, finance, and gaming.
